title: Implement evidence receipts, export, and superseding corrections

environment.os: Windows local; GitHub Actions Ubuntu and Windows pending

commands.name: Missing receipt domain
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/evidence-receipt.test.ts --reporter=dot
commands.expectedFailure: The focused unit suite failed to import the not-yet-created evidence-receipt module

commands.name: Missing receipt migration and PostgreSQL persistence
commands.expectedFailure: The migration inventory lacked 0014_evidence_receipts.sql and the PostgreSQL receipt repository did not exist

commands.name: Missing standalone verifier process
commands.expectedFailure: The CLI integration suite could not execute the not-yet-created receipt verifier

commands.name: Missing authenticated receipt API
commands.expectedFailure: The focused HTTP suite failed to import the not-yet-created receipt routes

commands.name: Self-consistent semantic-lineage rehash
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/evidence-receipt.test.ts --reporter=dot
commands.expectedFailure: Changing the agreement artifact and recomputing every byte hash still returned VALID until exact citation lineage was verified

commands.name: Plaintext filesystem object storage
commands.expectedFailure: The filesystem object-store fixture exposed the synthetic artifact bytes before AES-256-GCM encryption was added

commands.name: Receipt domain, storage, routes, verifier, and exact lineage
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/evidence-receipt.test.ts --project property tests/property/evidence-receipt.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/evidence-receipt.test.ts tests/integration/evidence-receipt-cli.test.ts tests/integration/finding-evaluation.test.ts apps/web/tests/integration/evidence-receipt-routes.test.ts tests/integration/domain-migrations.test.ts --reporter=dot

commands.name: Fixed-seed canonicalization, corruption, and correction properties
Receipt review and corruption recovery through production browser boundaries
Repository browser matrix exposed an unauthorized receipt request
commands.expectedFailure: Five existing test-operator browser scenarios recorded GET /receipts as an unexpected 403 because the new receipt panel requested evidence before checking the current server-loaded role

commands.name: Permission fix lint, type check, and optimized build
commands.command: pnpm lint; pnpm typecheck; pnpm build

commands.name: Evidence inventory recognized DET-04 proof
commands.command: pnpm evidence:check; pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/evidence-harness.test.ts --reporter=dot
commands.expectedFailure: Traceability accepted twenty-two manifests and 220 unique proof files while the explicit inventory regression still expected twenty-one manifests and 206 proof files

commands.name: DET-04 evidence traceability and explicit inventory
commands.command: pnpm evidence:check; pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/evidence-harness.test.ts --reporter=dot

scenarios.scenario: A reviewer can read and independently verify the exact evidence behind a conflict
A changed exported artifact invalidates verification without changing the stored receipt

assets.altText: Desktop Pactwire receipt detail showing eight direct-language evidence sections, exact test limits, agreement citation, approval effect, next human decision, valid verifier badge, and artifact hashes.
assets.caption: The reviewer can trace the recorded fictional submission from human-confirmed rule through deterministic observation to a separately verifiable export without relying on model prose.

assets.altText: Narrow Pactwire receipt detail stacking the same evidence, verifier status, and artifact hashes without horizontal overflow or hidden lineage.
assets.caption: The narrow review preserves scope, evidence ownership, approval boundary, and independent-verification detail in reading order.

proofs.description: Strict receipt schemas, canonical SHA-256 hashing, exact semantic lineage, redaction, immutable repositories, encrypted object storage, export, and verification
Append-only receipt metadata, exact finding/run lineage, superseding correction links, and stored bundle constraints
Standalone bundle verifier with deterministic valid and invalid exit codes and machine-readable reports
Required lineage, canonicalization, corruption, redaction, exact-citation, and self-consistent-rehash regressions
Fixed-seed PROP-08, PROP-09, and PROP-10 invariants with 500, 500, and 200 runs
Immutable metadata, content-addressed artifact storage, standalone export, and correction persistence
Separate-process valid export and one-byte corruption verification
PostgreSQL receipt persistence plus AES-256-GCM filesystem object-store encryption
Authenticated receipt review/export, independent verification, permission denial, and cross-workspace concealment
Eight-step direct-language receipt review, exact scope and citation, approval boundary, next decision, export, verifier result, and artifact hashes
Real-browser receipt review and independent valid-export story tagged DET-04, FR-042, FR-043, FR-044, and PROP-08
Real-browser corruption detection and unchanged-original recovery story tagged DET-04, FR-044, FR-045, PROP-09, and PROP-10
Browser/API/download/separate-verifier assertions and source-bound desktop/narrow capture
Source-bound sanitized standalone export containing all eight required controlled-fixture artifacts
Independent successful verification of eight artifacts and ten hashes
Independent rejection of a one-byte action-trace mutation with ARTIFACT_HASH_MISMATCH
Receipt evidence description, reproduction command, provenance, authority boundary, and explicit non-claim

knownLimitations: The committed receipt uses controlled fictional identities, reserved domains, synthetic observations, and a controlled agreement; it does not establish effectiveness on real school software.

A VALID report establishes byte integrity and included semantic lineage, not safety, compliance, approval, destination truth outside the human-confirmed record, or behavior outside the named test scope.
The encrypted filesystem object store is an implementation seam for controlled verification; production key custody, rotation, backup, and retention operations remain outside DET-04.
The standalone verifier checks the exported evidence supplied to it; independent ground truth for agreement meaning and destination identity remains human-owned.
GitHub Actions clean-checkout verification is pending because the current account billing rejection prevents jobs from starting before checkout.
